title: Astronomers May Have Found a Brand New Kind of Space Explosion
summary:
When big stars die, they explode in a supernova. When two dead stars called neutron stars crash into each other, they make a kilonova—which creates gold and uranium. Scientists have only seen one clear kilonova before, in 2017. Now they might have found a second one, but it's weird.

The event, called AT2025ulz, was spotted in August 2025. First, gravitational wave detectors (LIGO and Virgo) picked up a signal from two objects colliding. One of them was smaller than a typical neutron star. A few hours later, telescopes saw a red flash that looked like a kilonova. But after three days, it changed: it got brighter, turned bluer, and showed hydrogen—like a supernova.

Some astronomers thought it was just a regular supernova. But Mansi Kasliwal's team at Caltech thinks it could be something new: a "superkilonova." That's a kilonova happening inside a supernova. The idea is that a massive star explodes and creates two tiny neutron stars that then crash into each other. The supernova debris hides the kilonova from view.

If this is real, it would be the first time we've seen such an event. And it could help explain how heavy elements like gold are made in space.
why_it_matters: Space is full of surprises! This discovery shows that even with powerful telescopes, we are still finding brand new kinds of events that teach us about the building blocks of everything around us.

keywords.explanation: A supernova is a huge explosion when a big star dies.
A kilonova is a smaller explosion that happens when two dead stars crash together.
Neutron stars are the tiny, super-dense leftovers of exploded stars.
Gravitational wave detectors are machines that sense ripples in space caused by big events.
Uranium is a heavy metal used for nuclear energy and making bombs.
Hydrogen is the simplest and lightest gas in the universe.

questions.question: What happens when two dead stars called neutron stars crash together?
What is the name of the event discovered in August 2025?

options: It might be the first time we saw a kilonova inside a supernova
It shows the universe is ending
questions.correct_answer: It might be the first time we saw a kilonova inside a supernova

background_read: In 2017, scientists saw the first kilonova, which proved that gold and other heavy elements are made in space.
Since then, astronomers have been searching for more.
This new event, AT2025ulz, could be a rare type of explosion that teaches us more about how heavy elements are formed.
Article_Structure: WHO: Astronomers led by Mansi Kasliwal at Caltech.
WHAT: They may have discovered a new type of space explosion called a superkilonova.
WHERE: The event AT2025ulz was detected by LIGO and Virgo gravitational wave detectors and visible with telescopes.
WHY: Because it could be the first time we see a kilonova happening inside a supernova, helping explain how heavy elements like gold are made.

perspectives.description: If confirmed, this would be a breakthrough, giving us a new way to study how heavy elements are created.
Some astronomers think it might just be a regular supernova, so more observations are needed to be sure.
Future detections of similar events could reveal whether superkilonovas are common in the universe.
